The '''confessor's whip''' was a serrated barb tipped [[whip]] of [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] make, used in the martial arts form known as [[Petranaki/Legends|Petranaki]]. The barb was capable of inflicting major lacerations on a target, and was often coated in poison.

{{Weapon-stub}}
